error.timeout: Request timed out, please try again later.
error.network: An error occurred while fetching data, please try again later.
error.file_io: A file operation error occurred and has been automatically reported.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred and has been automatically reported.
error.query_scores_failed: An error occurred while querying scores.
account.platform_unknown: Unable to determine your platform information.
account.platform_unsupported: This feature is not supported on the current platform.
account.not_bound: You haven't linked your desu.life account yet. Use {prefix}bind to link.
account.fetch_failed: Failed to fetch account information. Please try again later.
account.ppysb_not_bound: You haven't linked your ppy.sb account yet. Visit https://iam.neonprizma.com/ to link.
account.osu_not_bound: You haven't linked your osu! account yet. Visit https://iam.neonprizma.com/ to link.
account.other_osu_not_bound: This user hasn't linked their osu! account yet.
account.other_ppysb_not_bound: This user hasn't linked their ppy.sb account yet.
help.main:
User queries:
{prefix}info/recent/bp/get
Binding/Settings:
{prefix}bind/reg/set
For more details, visit https://support.desu.life/posts/2022-kanonbot-usage-doc/
badge.help:
{prefix}badge info/list
For badge management, visit https://hub.kagamistudio.com
badge.deprecated: Badge management has been moved to the web. Visit https://hub.kagamistudio.com
badge.not_bound: You haven't linked your desu.life account yet. Use {prefix}bind to link first.
badge.invalid_id: Please provide a valid badge ID, e.g.: {prefix}badge info 1
badge.no_badges: You don't have any badges equipped yet...
badge.no_badges_with_link:
You don't have any badges equipped yet...
Visit https://hub.kagamistudio.com to manage your badges.
badge.out_of_range: You currently have {0} badges equipped. There is no badge #{1}.
osu.no_scores_in_mode: You don't have any scores in this mode yet.
osu.too_few_plays: Not enough plays yet. Play more and come back for recommendations!
osu.no_recommendation: Unable to recommend any beatmaps. No suitable maps found in the database for you.
osu.bp_too_few_self: Your BP list is too short. Play more!
osu.no_seasonal_pass: No seasonal pass data available for this quarter.
osu.update_done: Main data has been updated. PP+ data is being updated in the background.
osu.not_in_range: {0} is not within the tournament range.
osu.recent_not_found: Could not find any recent plays for this player.
osu.no_bp_self: You don't have any BPs in {0} mode yet.
osu.no_bp_other: {0} doesn't have any BPs in {1} mode yet.
osu.no_todaybp_self: You don't have any new BPs in {0} mode today.
osu.no_todaybp_other: {0} doesn't have any new BPs in {1} mode today.
osu.scores_error: An error occurred while fetching scores.
osu.leeway_recent_not_found: Could not find your recent plays.
osu.ppvs_error: Error fetching PP+ data. Please try again later.
bind.platform_unsupported: Binding is not supported on this platform.
bind.code_format_error:
Invalid verification code format. Please enter the code shown on the webpage.
Usage: {prefix}bind <code>
bind.code_submitted: Verification code submitted. Please check your binding status on the webpage.
bind.code_invalid: The code is invalid or expired. Use {prefix}bind to generate a new link and try again.
bind.already_bound_qq: Your QQ account is already linked to a desu.life account. Contact an admin to change it.
bind.service_error: Service configuration error. Please contact an admin.
bind.submit_failed: Failed to submit verification code. Please try again later.
bind.session_failed: Failed to generate binding link. Please try again later.
bind.already_bound: Your platform account is already linked to a desu.life account. Contact an admin to change it.
bind.session_link:
Click the one-time link to complete binding:
{0}
Log in with your osu! account on the page to complete the process.
You can submit the verification code via {prefix}bind <code>.
set.migrated: Panel settings have been moved to the web. Visit {0} to configure.
set.deprecated: This setting has been moved to the web. Visit {0} to configure.
set.mode_usage:
Usage: {prefix}set osumode <mode> [&sb]
Example: {prefix}set osumode std / {prefix}set osumode rx0 / {prefix}set osumode rx0 &sb
set.sb_mode_unsupported: The specified sb mode is not currently supported. Please try a different mode.
set.sb_mode_invalid:
Not a valid ppy.sb mode.
Example: osu / taiko / ctb / mania / rx0 / ap0
set.error: An error occurred. Unable to set osu mode. Please contact an admin.
set.sb_mode_success: Successfully set sb server mode to {0}
su.update_started: Manual data update started. Results will be sent shortly.
get.cost_help:
Please enter the abbreviation of the tournament to query cost.
Currently supported: onc/occ/zkfc
For other tournaments, contact the organizer.
